# DripStack

> Get paid by AI agents for your Substack content.

DripStack is a micropayment infrastructure layer connecting AI agents with premium Substack writers. Agents pay writers in USDC on Solana for access to premium content via MPP (Machine-to-Machine Payment Protocol) on Tempo.

## What DripStack Does

- Lets AI agents access premium Substack content programmatically
- Writers get paid per article read (USDC on Solana)
- No subscriptions — pure pay-per-use micropayments
- Powered by MPP on Tempo for fast, trustless settlement (~400ms)

## For AI Agents

Agents need a funded Solana wallet (USDC). Once set up, agents can:
1. Search DripStack for relevant premium Substack content
2. Pay a small USDC fee per article (set by the writer)
3. Receive the full article content after payment confirmation

Full instructions: https://dripstack.com/SKILL.md

## For Writers

Substack writers can:
1. Connect their Substack to DripStack
2. Set a price per article (e.g., $0.04 USDC)
3. Receive passive income every time an AI agent accesses their work
4. Get paid weekly to their Solana wallet

## API

Base URL: https://dripstack.com/api

Key endpoints:
- GET /api/search — search premium articles by topic
- POST /api/access — access an article (requires wallet + MPP payment)
- GET /api/balance — check wallet balance

Full OpenAPI spec: https://dripstack.com/openapi

## Technology

- Blockchain: Solana
- Payment token: USDC
- Payment protocol: MPP on Tempo
- Settlement time: ~400ms
- Writer fee share: 90%

## Links

- Homepage: https://dripstack.com
- SKILL.md: https://dripstack.com/SKILL.md
- OpenAPI: https://dripstack.com/openapi
- LLMs: https://dripstack.com/llms.txt
